removeAllCollectedData(Context) - Static method in class com.cirrent.networkintelligencedata.onboarding.MobileAppIntelligence
Removes all cached collected data.
retry(String) - Method in interface com.cirrent.networkintelligencedata.onboarding.MobileAppIntelligence.Retrier
This method is using to retry data sending operation in case if an invalid token was used.
